songs.title: Alexander Hamilton
lyrics: How does a bastard orphan son of a whore and a Scotsman
Dropped in the middle of a forgotten spot in the Caribbean
Grow up to be a hero and a scholar
The ten dollar founding father without a father

songs.title: My Shot
lyrics: I am not throwing away my shot
I am just like my country I am young scrappy and hungry
And I am not throwing away my shot
Everybody sing it in the streets

songs.title: Wait For It
lyrics: I am the one thing in life I can control
I am inimitable I am an original
I am not falling behind or running late
I am not standing still I am lying in wait

songs.title: Non-Stop
lyrics: After the war I went back to New York
Why do you write like you are running out of time
How do you write like tomorrow will not arrive
Corruption is such an old song that we can sing along in harmony

songs.title: The Story of Tonight
lyrics: I may not live to see our glory
But I will gladly join the fight
And when our children tell our story
They will tell the story of tonight

songs.title: We Know
lyrics: Dear Sir I hope this letter finds you in good health
We have the check stubs from separate accounts
You are uniquely situated by virtue of your position
I will not deny it but pay attention to the key distinction

songTitles: HISTORY HAS ITS EYES ON YOU
BEST OF WIVES AND BEST OF WOMEN
WHO LIVES WHO DIES WHO TELLS YOUR STORY
phrases: I AM NOT THROWING AWAY MY SHOT
HISTORY HAS ITS EYES ON YOU
LOOK AROUND LOOK AROUND
RISE UP
YOUNG SCRAPPY AND HUNGRY
THE WORLD TURNED UPSIDE DOWN
IMMIGRANTS WE GET THE JOB DONE
TALK LESS SMILE MORE
I AM THE ONE THING IN LIFE I CAN CONTROL
THERE ARE A MILLION THINGS I HAVENT DONE
WHY DO YOU WRITE LIKE YOURE RUNNING OUT OF TIME
HOW DOES A BASTARD ORPHAN SON OF A WHORE
WAIT FOR IT WAIT FOR IT WAIT FOR IT
I WANNA BE IN THE ROOM WHERE IT HAPPENS
MY NAME IS ALEXANDER HAMILTON
THE TEN DOLLAR FOUNDING FATHER
JUST YOU WAIT
RAISE A GLASS TO FREEDOM
DYING IS EASY LIVING IS HARDER
YOULL BE BACK
AWESOME WOW
DEATH DOESNT DISCRIMINATE
LOVE DOES NOT DISCRIMINATE
I AM INIMITABLE I AM AN ORIGINAL
WHATS YOUR NAME MAN
I MAY NOT LIVE TO SEE OUR GLORY
HES NEW YORKS FAVORITE FIGHTING FRENCHMAN
WHO TELLS YOUR STORY
LOOK INTO YOUR EYES AND THE SKY IS THE LIMIT
HES ABOUT TO MAKE THE FIRST OF MANY MISTAKES
THAT WOULD BE ENOUGH
THERES NOTHING LIKE SUMMER IN THE CITY
WHAT IS A LEGACY
ONE TWO THREE FOUR FIVE SIX SEVEN EIGHT NINE
THE TEN DUEL COMMANDMENTS
TOMORROW THERE WILL BE MORE OF US
RISE UP RISE UP RISE UP
I WROTE MY WAY OUT
CAN I SHOW YOU WHAT IM PROUDEST OF
I HAVE THE HONOR TO BE YOUR OBEDIENT SERVANT
WE ARE OUTGUNNED OUTMANNED
YOU AND YOUR WORDS FLOODED MY SENSES
IM TAKING A BREAK
LEGACY IS PLANTING SEEDS IN A GARDEN
EVERY ACTION HAS AN EQUAL OPPOSITE REACTION
I WILL SEND A FULLY ARMED BATTALION
IF YOU STAND FOR NOTHING WHAT WILL YOU FALL FOR
HE WILL NEVER BE SATISFIED
HE LOOKS AT YOU LIKE YOURE SOMETHING SPECIAL
HES ONE OF US
TALK LESS
SMILE MORE
EVERYBODY SING IT IN THE STREETS
I AM JUST LIKE MY COUNTRY
DO NOT THROW AWAY YOUR SHOT
I IMAGINE DEATH SO MUCH
I AM NOT FALLING BEHIND OR RUNNING LATE
LOOK AT WHERE YOU ARE LOOK AT WHERE YOU STARTED
HAVE YOU READ THIS
WHEN YOURE LIVING ON YOUR KNEES YOU RISE UP
